embed.title: Installation
embed.subtitle: Pick your preferred method to embed the widgets.
embed.instruction: Copy and paste this code before the closing </body> tag.
benefits: No code changes needed after install
embed.wpInstruction: Install our plugin or paste the script manually.

events.title: Order Tracking (API)
events.subtitle: Send actual order data from your system to LiveProof.
events.info: Send order data as soon as payment is completed. Orders will be displayed on your widgets.

wordpress.title: WordPress Installation
steps: Install 'Insert Headers and Footers' or a similar plugin.
Paste the Master Script into the 'Scripts in Footer' section.
If using Elementor/Gutenberg, use an 'HTML' widget at the bottom.

html.title: Manual / Custom Site
steps: Open your main layout or footer file (e.g. footer.html, layout.php).
Paste the script just before the closing </body> tag.
Save and refresh your site to verify.

shopify.title: Shopify Installation
steps: Go to Online Store > Themes > Edit Code.
Paste the script before the closing </body> tag.

campaigns.globalDesc: Enable to show flash sale on all pages.
campaigns.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this campaign?

seo.title: Keyword SEO Optimization
seo.subtitle: Leverage social proof to boost your keyword rankings on Google.
seo.keywordsPlaceholder: e.g. running shoes, gym accessories, iphone 15 pro max...
seo.tipDesc: The system silently optimizes your site for Google by injecting JSON-LD Schema fragments containing your target keywords. This helps Googlebot understand your page's context without affecting the user interface or distracting your customers.
